focus: Sync latest demand-data-generation active artifact after Google Keyword Planner volume updates.
reasonStarted: The upstream demand data was updated with Google Keyword Planner data for several sectors, and live assessments need the latest demand records.

new: The assessment app should consume the latest active demand artifact with 540 active records.
Real Estate demand fit should include synced Keyword Planner monthly search counts.
Monthly count availability should continue to be optional and should not invent volume for null records.
reused: Generated demand data remains owned by demand-data-generation and consumed as a release artifact.
Customer Demand Fit must keep found evidence, missing signals, confidence, and pages checked traceable.
Unsupported or unclear website industries skip demand scoring honestly.

validation.build: passed with existing documented Turbopack tracing warning
validation.cloudflareBuild: passed on rerun with existing documented OpenNext tsconfig warning
validation.cloudflareBuildFirstAttempt: failed because normal Next build was running in parallel; rerun passed with no code changes
validation.builtPackageSmoke: Real Estate assessed with 290 records evaluated, 147 monthly-count records, and monthly-search opportunities available.

staging.selfQaSummary: Completed with 8 pages crawled, high evidence confidence, Real Estate demand satisfaction, 290 records evaluated, 147 monthly-count records, and 5 monthly-search opportunities.

production.selfQaSummary: Completed with 8 pages crawled, high evidence confidence, Real Estate demand satisfaction, 290 records evaluated, 147 monthly-count records, and 5 monthly-search opportunities.

knownRisks: The assessment app still consumes demand data by copied release artifact; automated upstream sync remains deferred.
